arts.ttl: Man United's Patrick Dorgu deal 'delayed': When could 20-year-old make Red Devils debut?
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu's switch to Manchester United from Lecce is allegedly delayed, with the Denmark international now not expected to travel to England until Saturday.

arts.ttl: Lecce asking for final allowances on Patrick Dorgu – Reasons why Manchester United transfer may be delayed
arts.sum: Two days ago, multiple claims from Italy stated Manchester United and Lecce have come to an agreement for Patrick Dorgu’s transfer. On Wednesday, Italian journalist Gianluca Di Marzio reported the Red Devils were sorting out the last details of the operation. arts.ttl: Serie A | Parma v Lecce: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A relegation battle intensifies, Parma and Lecce prepare for a pivotal Friday night clash at Stadio Tardini. Both teams, reeling from defeats against Milan giants last week, find themselves in desperate need of points to escape the drop zone.
